revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Template:NHS Japan header/doc]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Template:NHS Japan header/doc]]</includeonly>

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: importing redirects I created with chatGPT
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Template:NHS Japan header/doc]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Template:NHS Japan header/doc]]</includeonly>

#redirect[[:en:Template:NHS Japan header/doc]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Template:NHS Japan header/doc]]</includeonly>

{{Documentation subpage}} <!-- Categories go at the bottom of this page and interwikis go in Wikidata. -->
== Usage == <syntaxhighlight lang="wikitext"> {{NHS Japan header | prefecture = | prefecture_iso = }} </syntaxhighlight> * prefecture - a link to one of the [[prefectures of Japan|47 prefectures]] * prefecture_iso - the [[ISO 3166-2:JP|iso code]] of the prefecture
For example, for [[List of Historic Sites of Japan (Iwate)]]: <syntaxhighlight lang="wikitext"> {{NHS Japan header | prefecture = [[Iwate Prefecture|Iwate]] | prefecture_iso = JP-03 }} </syntaxhighlight>
The data isn't show, but used by a bot.
== See also == * {{tl|NHS Japan row}}
<includeonly>{{Sandbox other|| <!-- Categories go here, and interwikis go in Wikidata --> [[Category:Monument list templates]] }}</includeonly>

revision.comment: Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} <!-- Categories go at the bottom of this page and interwikis go in Wikidata. -->
== Usage == <syntaxhighlight lang="wikitext"> {{NHS Japan header | prefecture = | prefecture_iso = }} </syntaxhighlight> * prefecture - a link to one of the [[prefectures of Japan|47 prefectures]] * prefecture_iso - the [[ISO 3166-2:JP|iso code]] of the prefecture
For example, for [[:en:List of Historic Sites of Japan (Iwate)|List of Historic Sites of Japan (Iwate)]]: <syntaxhighlight lang="wikitext"> {{NHS Japan header | prefecture = [[Iwate Prefecture|Iwate]] | prefecture_iso = JP-03 }} </syntaxhighlight>
The data isn't show, but used by a bot.

== Usage == <syntaxhighlight lang="wikitext"> {{NHS Japan header | prefecture = | prefecture_iso = }} </syntaxhighlight> * prefecture - a link to one of the [[:en:Prefectures of Japan|47 prefectures]] * prefecture_iso - the [[ISO 3166-2:JP|iso code]] of the prefecture
For example, for [[:en:List of Historic Sites of Japan (Iwate)|List of Historic Sites of Japan (Iwate)]]: <syntaxhighlight lang="wikitext"> {{NHS Japan header | prefecture = [[Iwate Prefecture|Iwate]] | prefecture_iso = JP-03 }} </syntaxhighlight>

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} <!-- Categories go at the bottom of this page and interwikis go in Wikidata. -->
== Usage == <syntaxhighlight lang="wikitext"> {{NHS Japan header | prefecture = | prefecture_iso = }} </syntaxhighlight> * prefecture - a link to one of the [[:en:Prefectures of Japan|47 prefectures]] * prefecture_iso - the [[ISO 3166-2:JP|iso code]] of the prefecture
For example, for [[:en:List of Historic Sites of Japan (Iwate)|List of Historic Sites of Japan (Iwate)]]: <syntaxhighlight lang="wikitext"> {{NHS Japan header | prefecture = [[Iwate Prefecture|Iwate]] | prefecture_iso = JP-03 }} </syntaxhighlight>
The data isn't show, but used by a bot.

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} <!-- Categories go at the bottom of this page and interwikis go in Wikidata. -->
== Usage == <syntaxhighlight lang="wikitext"> {{NHS Japan header | prefecture = | prefecture_iso = }} </syntaxhighlight> * prefecture - a link to one of the [[:en:Prefectures of Japan|47 prefectures]] * prefecture_iso - the [[ISO 3166-2:JP|iso code]] of the prefecture
For example, for [[:en:List of Historic Sites of Japan (Iwate)|List of Historic Sites of Japan (Iwate)]]: <syntaxhighlight lang="wikitext"> {{NHS Japan header | prefecture = [[Iwate Prefecture|Iwate]] | prefecture_iso = JP-03 }} </syntaxhighlight>
The data isn't show, but used by a bot.
== See also == * {{tl|NHS Japan row}}
<includeonly>{{Sandbox other|| <!-- Categories go here, and interwikis go in Wikidata --> [[Category:Monument list templates]] }}</includeonly>

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} <!-- Categories go at the bottom of this page and interwikis go in Wikidata. -->
== Usage == <syntaxhighlight lang="wikitext"> {{NHS Japan header | prefecture = | prefecture_iso = }} </syntaxhighlight> * prefecture - a link to one of the [[:en:Prefectures of Japan|47 prefectures]] * prefecture_iso - the [[ISO 3166-2:JP|iso code]] of the prefecture
For example, for [[:en:List of Historic Sites of Japan (Iwate)|List of Historic Sites of Japan (Iwate)]]: <syntaxhighlight lang="wikitext"> {{NHS Japan header | prefecture = [[Iwate Prefecture|Iwate]] | prefecture_iso = JP-03 }} </syntaxhighlight>
The data isn't show, but used by a bot.
== See also == * {{tl|NHS Japan row}}

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 2 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23515730952|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} <!-- Categories go at the bottom of this page and interwikis go in Wikidata. -->
== Usage == <syntaxhighlight lang="wikitext"> {{NHS Japan header | prefecture = | prefecture_iso = }} </syntaxhighlight> * prefecture - a link to one of the [[:en:Prefectures of Japan|47 prefectures]] * prefecture_iso - the [[ISO 3166-2:JP|iso code]] of the prefecture
For example, for [[:en:List of Historic Sites of Japan (Iwate)|List of Historic Sites of Japan (Iwate)]]: <syntaxhighlight lang="wikitext"> {{NHS Japan header | prefecture = [[Iwate Prefecture|Iwate]] | prefecture_iso = JP-03 }} </syntaxhighlight>
The data isn't show, but used by a bot.
== See also == * {{tl|NHS Japan row}}

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24951476559|time triggered pipeline]]
